# Digital Transformation Project

The Digital Transformation project is a joint initiative between Acme Corp and Meridian Financial Group. The project aims to modernize legacy financial reporting systems.

Dr. Chen designed the data pipeline architecture. B. Anderson provided financial oversight from CFO Centre Canada. James Liu approved the technical roadmap.

The stack uses Python, PostgreSQL, and Apache Kafka. Phase 1 launched in Q3 2025. Phase 2 is scheduled for Q1 2026.

Budget: $1.8M, funded jointly by Acme and Meridian.
